## Purpose

Describe the business, data, platform, or model outcome.

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/run_all.py`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Data-contract impact reviewed
- [ ] Model-metric impact reviewed
- [ ] Security and privacy impact reviewed
- [ ] Deployment and rollback path documented

## Operational impact

Document runtime, cost, SLO, observability, backfill, migration, and rollback implications.
